title: F018 — Observer Recursion
caption: Nested observation is represented as awareness reflecting upon awareness within wider informational frames.
surroundingTextPreview: The scientific evidence does not support such a simplistic claim. Nevertheless, consciousness remains unique because it represents a system capable of reflecting upon observation itself. Humans do not merely observe. Humans observe that they observe. This recursive capacity introduces higher-order informational structures that may play an important role in how reality is modeled, interpreted, and experienced. Within the FHQCM, consciousness functions as a recursive integrator of information rath
